defaultSenderHelp: Max. 11 alphanumeric or 16 numeric characters. Empty = seven.io account default. Alphanumeric sender IDs cannot receive SMS replies — only numeric senders allow inbound.
inboundIntervalHelp: 0 = disabled. Requires a virtual number rented from seven.io (~€20/month). Alphanumeric senders cannot receive replies — only numeric senders or a rented virtual number allow inbound SMS.
pricingCountry: Country code for pricing (e.g. DE, US)
pricingCountryHelp: ISO country code to filter pricing data. Leave empty to load prices for all countries.
